name: Vintage Inspired Ornate Storage Bench with Detailed Cutout Textured Velvet - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring a soft, classic touch to your space with this Vintage Inspired Ornate Storage Bench with Detailed Cutout Textured Velvet from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This rectangular bench features a smooth upholstered seat paired with decorative cutout accents that bring a charming look to any room. The spacious interior offers simple storage for throws, pillows, or everyday items, while the 18.9-inch seat height makes it comfortable for sitting.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.

Height：18.9 in
Width：45.1 in
Depth：19.3 in
